input.command: go test ./internal/parser/ -coverprofile=/tmp/cov.out 2>&1 && go tool cover -func=/tmp/cov.out | grep -E "(detect|total)"
go test -v -coverpkg=./internal/parser/... ./tests/parser/ -run "TestDetect|TestProjectSlug" -coverprofile=/tmp/cov2.out 2>&1 | tail -5 && go tool cover -func=/tmp/cov2.out | grep -E "(detect|total)"

go tool cover -html=/tmp/cov2.out -o /tmp/cov2.html 2>&1; grep -A2 "class=\"cov0\"" /tmp/cov2.html | grep "detect" | head -30 || true; python3 -c " import re with open('/tmp/cov2.html') as f: content = f.read() # Find cov0 spans spans = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', content, re.DOTALL) for s in spans[:30]: clean = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', s).strip() if clean: print(repr(clean[:80])) " 2>&1
